resolution: Use scripts/check-contract-drift.mjs and runtime/package quality gates as the source of truth before marking issues closed
Shared service boundary contract is present but must be re-validated against backend/worker registries and snapshots
Fail-closed defaults and runtime capability exposure are required before production promotion
Worker deploy and secret mutation flows are restricted to CI or GitOps-capable environments
Backend proxy failures must surface degraded or unavailable status instead of zero-value success payloads
Each worker package must expose explicit typecheck and test scripts consumed by CI
